mapper.select:
SELECT eduQuestionBank.* , eduCourse.course_name AS courseName , eduCourseChapter.chapter_name AS chapterName FROM edu_question_bank eduQuestionBank LEFT JOIN edu_course eduCourse ON eduQuestionBank.course_id = eduCourse.id LEFT JOIN edu_course_chapter eduCourseChapter ON eduQuestionBank.chapter_id = eduCourseChapter.id
ORDER BY eduQuestionBank.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_question_bank eduQuestionBank LEFT JOIN edu_course eduCourse ON eduQuestionBank.course_id = eduCourse.id LEFT JOIN edu_course_chapter eduCourseChapter ON eduQuestionBank.chapter_id = eduCourseChapter.id

SELECT eduQuestionBank.* , eduCourse.course_name AS courseName , eduCourseChapter.chapter_name AS chapterName FROM edu_question_bank eduQuestionBank LEFT JOIN edu_course eduCourse ON eduQuestionBank.course_id = eduCourse.id LEFT JOIN edu_course_chapter eduCourseChapter ON eduQuestionBank.chapter_id = eduCourseChapter.id
ORDER BY eduQuestionBank.create_time DESC

SELECT eduQuestionBank.* , eduCourse.course_name AS courseName , eduCourseChapter.chapter_name AS chapterName FROM edu_question_bank eduQuestionBank LEFT JOIN edu_course eduCourse ON eduQuestionBank.course_id = eduCourse.id LEFT JOIN edu_course_chapter eduCourseChapter ON eduQuestionBank.chapter_id = eduCourseChapter.id WHERE eduQuestionBank.id = #{id}
